data.title: Crypto News: Ark Invest Buys CRCL, Sells COIN, HOOD, Bitcoin ETF Shares
data.description:
Cathie Wood’s investment management firm, Ark Invest, purchased 4. 5 million shares of Circle (CRCL) on the USDC issuer’s debut. Ark Invest funds trimmed holdings in a number of shares, including Coinbase (COIN), Robinhood Markets (HOOD), and even its ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (ARKB)
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/crypto-news-ark-invest-buys-crcl-sells-coin-hood-bitcoin-etf-shares/

data.title: IOST Secures Strategic Funding to Push RWA and DeFi Integration Globally
data.description:
TL;DR IOST raised $21 million in a strategic funding round led by DWF Labs, Presto, and Rollman Management Group. The capital will be used to strengthen and scale its core infrastructure for tokenizing real-world assets (RWA) in fully regulated markets. Japan, where IOST already holds official government approval, will be the initial focus of deployment,. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/iost-secures-strategic-funding-to-push-rwa-and-defi-integration-globally/

data.title: UK FCA Eyes Retail Access to Crypto ETNs, Ending Four-Year UK Freeze
data.description:
Crypto ETNs may soon return for UK retail buyers as the Financial Conduct Authority has proposed removing its ban and permitting notes tracking Bitcoin, Ether and similar assets on recognised investment exchanges, provided issuers meet disclosure standards and promotion safeguards.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/fca-retail-access-crypto-etns-uk/

data.description:

data.title: Circle's stock price rose by more than 40%, possibly due to the positive impact of technology giants exploring the integration of stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to people familiar with the matter, Apple, X, Airbnb and Google are in preliminary talks with cryptocurrency companies on integrating stablecoins. These companies will adopt stablecoins as a means to reduce transaction costs and optimize cross-border payments. Perhaps affected by this news, Circle's stock price rose by more than 40% today. It once rose above $118. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin mining company MARA joins MIT Media Lab
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin mining company MARA announced that it has joined the Massachusetts Institute of Technology MIT Media Lab. The two parties will explore how digital energy technologies can support energy systems. MARA will monetize excess energy and balance the power grid with flexible electricity demand, exploring new ways to advance energy systems using digital energy technologies such as Bitcoin mining.

data.title: Today, the US ETF Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 2,368 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 6,589 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US ETF Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 2,368 BTC, of ​​which ARK 21Shares had an outflow of 998 BTC. Currently, ARK 21Shares holds 45,616 BTC, worth US$4.78 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 6,589 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 13,480 ETH. Currently, BlackRock holds 1,506,775 ETH, worth US$3.8 billion.

data.title: Trump Highlights Positive Economic Indicators on Social Media
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump recently took to social media to highlight the strong performance of employment data and the subsequent surge in the stock market. He also noted the influx of billions of dollars resulting from tariffs.

data.title: Deutsche Bank is exploring stablecoins and tokenized deposits
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market News: Deutsche Bank is exploring stablecoins and tokenized deposits. (Jinshi)

data.title: Cork Protocol updates hacker incident progress: will redeploy the market to enable LP withdrawals
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Cork Protocol officially updated the progress of the hacker attack, revealing that Cork Protocol suffered a vulnerability attack at 11:39 UTC time on May 28, resulting in 3,761 wstETH being stolen from the wstETH:weETH market. The next step will be to redeploy the market to enable LP withdrawals and actively recover the stolen funds, while integrating key learnings to strengthen and improve Cork's protocol security and resilience.

data.title: Deutsche Bank Explores Stablecoins and Tokenized Deposits
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Deutsche Bank is currently investigating the potential of stablecoins and tokenized deposits. This move reflects the bank's interest in digital currency innovations and its potential applications in the financial sector. The exploration into these digital assets aligns with a broader trend among financial institutions seeking to integrate blockchain technology into their operations.

data.title: Polymarket becomes X’s official prediction market partner
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News X announced that it will cooperate with Polymarket and become its official prediction market partner.
